causes_of_pollution: Raw vegetables contaminated with E. coli
Inadequate treatment and protection of water during distribution
Contamination through ingress of foreign material, including soil or plants
recommended_measures: Protection of raw water supplies from human and animal waste
Adequate treatment and protection of water during distribution
Public education on safe water handling and consumption practices

station_name: Thumbe Water Supply Stations To Mangalore City
causes_of_pollution: Human waste from day-care centers, prisons, and psychiatric institutions
Flies as a transmission vector from contaminated faecal waste
recommended_measures: Protect raw water supplies from human waste
Implement adequate treatment and protection of water during distribution
Use Escherichia coli (or thermotolerant coliforms) as a reliable indicator for Shigella spp.
Monitor water quality regularly to prevent short-term peaks in pathogen concentration
Implement public health surveillance among representative communities to measure the effectiveness of water quality interventions

station_name: Water Supply Intake Point To T Narasipura
recommended_measures: Protect raw water supplies from human and animal waste
Adequate treatment and protection of water during distribution
Regular monitoring and surveillance of water quality
Public education and awareness about waterborne diseases

station_name: Water Supply Intake Point At Kollegala Dasanapura
